## Type of Change

<!-- Check the relevant option(s): -->

- [ ] **feat** — New feature or functionality
- [ ] **fix** — Bug fix
- [ ] **docs** — Documentation only
- [ ] **refactor** — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] **test** — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] **chore** — Build, CI, dependency, or tooling changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's [style guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style--standards)
- [ ] New code includes docstrings and type hints
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] New functionality includes tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Configuration changes are reflected in `configs/default.yaml`
- [ ] README or documentation is updated (if behavior changes)
- [ ] Branch is rebased on latest `main`
